programme.desc: George finds a deep-fried bacon and jalapeno cheeseburger, a butter-saturated hamburger and a freeze-dried space burger.

programme.title: Airplane Repo
programme.desc: Super Repo Man Mike Kennedy boldly risks an emergency landing on a remote Alaskan glacier, while strongman Danny Thompson frees a $1.8 million Lear 31 from its hangar by hand.

programme.title: Salvage Hunters: Classic Cars
programme.desc: A super-rare Renault 5 Gordini gives an opportunity to create the best hatch on the market. Renault craftsmen try for a factory perfect restoration.

programme.title: Custom Carolina
programme.desc: Tommy Pike and his team bring a 1955 Chevy pickup back to life.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Race Night in America
programme.desc: Across America, street racers take on their rivals for cash prizes. A group of racers meet up on the streets of Oklahoma for a night of grudge racing.

programme.title: Farmtruck & AZN Down Under
programme.desc: Farmtruck and AZN arrive in Sydney and find races with a real-deal steel car and a one-of-a-kind Skyline.

programme.title: Man V Food
programme.desc: Casey Webb's culinary adventures take him to Kansas City, Missouri. He takes part in the Elvis Challenge: a 1.3kg almond butter and jelly sandwich.

programme.title: Car Fix
programme.desc: It's time to hit the dyno when Jared and Lou take a stock Manual EcoBoost Mustang and make massive horsepower gains with an upgraded Turbo kit.

programme.title: Car Fix

programme.title: Flipping RVs

programme.title: Three Chairs

programme.title: Alaska Missionaries

programme.title: My Best Friend's Bouquet
programme.desc: A hopeless romantic misses all of the signs of true love when she puts her trust in a bouquet tossed at a wedding.

programme.title: Autumn in the Vineyard

programme.title: The Legends of SFC

programme.title: Hour of Power
programme.desc: Pastor Bobby Schuller provides spiritual principles and practices that can help people become happy students of Jesus and live a life of meaning believing there is no fuller, richer life than the one that is lived in Christ.

programme.title: Joel Osteen
programme.desc: Direct from Houston, Texas, join Joel and Victoria Osteen and the team from Lakewood Church, for a session of powerful music and empowering preaching.

programme.title: Give Me an Answer

programme.title: Stealing the Show

programme.title: The Listening Road
programme.desc: Captures the story of one man's remarkable journey cycling 3,000 miles across the USA on a mission to engage with people from all walks of life in real conversations about faith, their stories & things that matter most.

programme.title: The Journey - 20 years of Red Frogs

programme.title: Flip that Romance

programme.title: Billy Graham Classics

programme.title: Power for Living

programme.title: 90 Day Fiance: Happily Ever After?
programme.desc: The couples reunite from their homes. Angela and Michael struggle with trust issues. Colt clashes with both of his exes.

programme.title: Luxury Escapes: World's Best Holidays

programme.title: Alison Hammond's Big Weekend
programme.desc: Hollywood star, Luke Evans shares his struggles with bullying and being raised as a Jehovah's Witness.

programme.title: Gordon, Gino And Fred's Road Trip
programme.desc: Gino and Fred are thrilled to head to San Francisco for their own Summer of Love. Gino can't wait to explore the city that's all about hippies, sex, drugs, and rock and roll.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Next Level Chef

programme.title: The Great Australian Bake Off

programme.title: Rick Stein's Secret France

programme.title: Rick Stein's India

programme.title: James Martin's Spanish Adventure

programme.title: Ainsley's Market Menu

programme.title: Jamie's Super Food Family Classics

programme.desc: Hugh's whole style of cooking and eating has changed. He decides to throw an autumn feast that includes stuffed squashes, sweet eggplant and vegetable puddings as a testament to show how easy meat-free cooking can be.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid

programme.title: Naked and Afraid
programme.desc: Fan survivalist Matt, notorious for his former partner sharting in their water source, teams up with environmentalist, Kerra, to take on 21-days in Zambia.

programme.title: Answers with Bayless Conley
programme.desc: In Intercession for a Wicked City Part 2, Pastor Bayless explores how Abraham's persistent prayers for Sodom reflect our calling to pray for the lost today.

programme.title: Elevation Experience
programme.desc: The Elevation Experience with Pastor Steven Furtick features inspirational and challenging messages from Pastor Steven as well as original worship music from Elevation Church in Charlotte, North Carolina.

programme.title: PowerPoint with Jack Graham
programme.desc: PowerPoint Ministries started as a vision of Dr Jack Graham 20 years ago with a vision to glorify God by introducing Jesus Christ as Lord to as many people as possible and to develop them in Christian living.

programme.title: Joel Osteen
programme.desc: Direct from Houston, Texas, join Joel and Victoria Osteen and the team from Lakewood Church, for a session of powerful music and empowering preaching.

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches messages centred on the pure gospel of the grace of God. His desire is to help believers understand grace and how deeply loved they are by their heavenly Father.

programme.title: Katherine Ruonala Ministries
programme.desc: If Jesus Himself withdrew to the mountain to pray, how much more must we set aside time to pray like Him.

programme.title: Jentezen Franklin
programme.desc: New York Times bestselling author, Pastor Jentezen Franklin, brings practical meaning to spiritual truths found in God's Word. Kingdom Connection is the teaching ministry of Free Chapel, a multi-campus church with a global ministry.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: You can overcome perfectionism! Joyce shares how to let go of unreasonable expectations and enjoy more hope and freedom in your life.

programme.title: Free Burma Rangers
programme.desc: Follow Dave, Karen, and their three young children, as they venture into war zones where they are fighting to bring hope.

programme.title: Raising Global Citizens
programme.desc: After news that their dear friend had passed away, the Primus Family decide to give up their busy life in New York to journey around the world.

programme.title: Stealing the Show
programme.desc: What's a group of theatre nerds to do when their mentor is arrested? Combine their skills, plan a heist to exonerate him, and pull it off without getting caught by the FBI!

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches messages centred on the pure gospel of the grace of God. His desire is to help believers understand grace and how deeply loved they are by their heavenly Father.

programme.title: The Catholic Guy
programme.desc: Bruce Downes is The Catholic Guy. No matter your age, situation or background, be prepared to laugh, learn and listen to what God is trying to say to you. Wherever you matter where you are around the world today, God is never far from you.

programme.title: Songs of Praise
programme.desc: Sally Magnusson begins the first of three journeys in the beautiful West Highlands of Scotland and heads for the islands of Cumbrae and Bute.

programme.title: Be Great. Do Good
programme.desc: Launching, building and running a business can be an exciting undertaking. But even as many look on and see the success, sometimes behind that success is betrayal, lost friendships and relationships.

programme.title: Tyson's Run
programme.desc: An unathletic boy with autism strives to become an unlikely marathon champion learning that with faith in yourself and the courage to take the first step, anything is possible.

programme.title: Prone to Wander
programme.desc: Seven months after a family tragedy, Anastasia Dearborn withdraws to the Appalachian Trail to salvage her identity but gets more than she bargains for after encountering three fellow hikers.

programme.title: Hour of Power
programme.desc: Pastor Bobby Schuller provides spiritual principles and practices that can help people become happy students of Jesus and live a life of meaning believing there is no fuller, richer life than the one that is lived in Christ.

programme.title: Life with Paul De Jong
programme.desc: We like to call it 'soul food'. LIFE TV uses creative illustration, real life stories and biblical teaching to encourage and help viewers discover a greater purpose to their lives.

programme.title: Answers with Bayless Conley
programme.desc: In Intercession for a Wicked City Part 2, Pastor Bayless explores how Abraham's persistent prayers for Sodom reflect our calling to pray for the lost today.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Feeling spiritually worn down? Today, Joyce teaches how to recognise the enemy's subtle attacks-and how to pray with power before burnout sets in.

programme.title: Songs of Praise
programme.desc: Sally Magnusson begins the first of three journeys in the beautiful West Highlands of Scotland and heads for the islands of Cumbrae and Bute.

programme.title: Tyson's Run
programme.desc: An unathletic boy with autism strives to become an unlikely marathon champion learning that with faith in yourself and the courage to take the first step, anything is possible.

programme.title: Flying High For The Glory Of God
programme.desc: Be inspired by the extraordinary life of Pilot & world champion runner Orville Rogers , a man who trained bomber pilots in WWII, flew a B-36 on secret missions in Korea and ferried airplanes to remote Christian missions all over the world.

programme.title: Praise, Prayer and Preaching
programme.desc: The heart of the weekly teaching at Wesley Mission Sydney is the Sunday night experience in the Wesley Theatre. Be part of the weekly service with Rev Keith Garner as he shares with his congregation a message from the bible.

programme.title: Celebrations with Lacey Chabert
programme.desc: Tanya is a firefighter who also mentors young women coming up the ranks. Lacey and her team put together an epic beachside event that will honour Tanya and showcase the incredible work she has done.

programme.title: Celebrations with Lacey Chabert
programme.desc: Teen Justin has worked tirelessly to save nearly 80 acres in the Rainforests of Ecuador, home to many species of frogs. Lacey and her team are throwing him Rainforest Celebration to honour his efforts.

programme.title: Celebrations with Lacey Chabert
programme.desc: Sophie volunteers at Ride On Therapeutic Horsemanship Center, assisting young riders and caring for the animals. Now, Lacey teams up with Lisa and Marisa to celebrate Sophie with a pre-Bat Mitzvah Party at the Barn.

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.sub-title: Pursue The Healer And Be Healed Pt 4 of 4
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches messages centred on the pure gospel of the grace of God. His desire is to help believers understand grace and how deeply loved they are by their heavenly Father.

programme.title: Bible Man
programme.sub-title: Say Goodbye to the Grand Duchess of Greed Part 2
programme.desc: Miles Peterson had everything: Money, power, fame. Until he lost it. Then Miles finds the power of God and harnesses that power to become Bibleman.

programme.title: Sea Kids
programme.desc: This program will help transform the heart and mind of every child as they learn how to tangibly live out biblical principles and build a strong foundation in Jesus.

programme.title: Ryan Defrates: Secret Agent
programme.desc: Ryan Defrates is a young spy with a whole lot to learn. One day he's paired with a very unlikely partner, his mum. She knows more about shopping than solving crime, but her wisdom somehow seem to save the day.

programme.title: PowerPoint with Jack Graham
programme.desc: PowerPoint Ministries started as a vision of Dr Jack Graham 20 years ago with a vision to glorify God by introducing Jesus Christ as Lord to as many people as possible and to develop them in Christian living.

programme.title: The Kindness Diaries
programme.desc: Leon Logothetis hops on a vintage motorbike for a 25,000-mile trip around the world with no money, food, petrol or place to stay. He puts his fate in the hands of strangers and rewards those who show kindness.

programme.title: Shrek 2
programme.desc: Happily ever after will have to wait as Shrek, Princess Fiona, and Donkey visit the in-laws. Outraged that Fiona has wed an ogre, the King hires hit man Puss in Boots to make the problem disappear.

programme.title: The Tale of Despereaux
programme.desc: An unusually brave mouse helps to restore happiness to a forlorn kingdom after making friends with a gentleman rat.

programme.title: The Karate Kid (2010)
programme.desc: Dre, a young boy, finds himself bullied by Cheng, a rebellious kung fu prodigy at his school. However, things change after he befriends Mr Han, a maintenance man, who happens to be a kung fu expert.

programme.title: Chicken Run
programme.desc: A smooth-talking rooster crash-lands into a farm and attempts to help a group of chickens escape. With teamwork and a little bit of cluck, the fearless flock plots one last daring attempt for freedom.

programme.title: Bookworm
programme.desc: Mildred's world is turned upside down when her estranged father, comes to look after her and agrees to take her camping to find the mythological beast, the Canterbury Panther.

programme.title: Harold and the Purple Crayon
programme.desc: Harold can bring anything in his book to life by drawing it. When he grows up and steps out of the book and into the real world, he realises he has much to learn.

programme.title: Despicable Me 3
programme.desc: Everyone's favourite reformed super-villain Gru returns for more adventures with Lucy, their daughters, and the lovably zany minions.

programme.title: The Wild Robot
programme.desc: Shipwrecked on a deserted island, a robot named Roz must learn to adapt to its new surroundings. Building relationships with the native animals, Roz soon develops a parental bond with an orphaned gosling.

programme.title: Jurassic Park III
programme.desc: A small team embark on a dangerous task, searching through a deserted island inhabited by ferocious dinosaurs.

programme.title: Paddington 2
programme.desc: Now happily settled with the Brown family, Paddington picks up a series of odd jobs to buy the perfect present for his Aunt Lucy's 100th birthday, only for the gift to be stolen.

programme.title: Pixels
programme.desc: When aliens discover video feeds of classic arcade games and misinterpret them as a declaration of war, they attack the Earth, using the video games as models for their assaults.

programme.title: The Lost World: Jurassic Park
programme.desc: It has been four years since the disaster at Jurassic Park and two groups are in a race against time that will determine the fate of the remote island's prehistoric inhabitants.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: When the evil wizard Gargamel chases the tiny blue Smurfs out of their village, they tumble from their magical world into New York City.

programme.title: Balto
programme.desc: A true story of a sled dog who braved the Alaskan wilderness to carry life-saving medicine to a remote village in 1925. A remarkable tale of a hero who inspired a nation.

programme.title: Sylvanian Families
programme.desc: In Sylvanian village, everyone awaits the Festival of the Stars, but rabbit girl Freya worries as she must find the Tree of the Year for the main event.

programme.title: Time Team
programme.desc: The team unearths the secrets of a Cotswolds field. Roman coins and bits of masonry have been found on this land, but it's the discovery of a piece of mosaic floor that has the archaeologists excited.

programme.title: Thomas Cromwell: A Very Modern Tudor
programme.desc: Historian Tracy Borman investigates to the rise of Thomas Cromwell from the son of a Putney blacksmith to Henry VIII's right hand man.

programme.title: River Hunters
programme.desc: This season kicks off with an investigation into the last battle to have taken place on British soil: the battle of Culloden in 1746, on the outskirts of the capital of the Highlands, Inverness.

programme.title: London: 2000 Years of History
programme.desc: Doctor Suzannah Lipscomb is granted access to view artefacts from Henry VIII's pleasure palace. Dan Jones tells the story of Dick Whittington and discovers what 14th-century skeletons reveal about the Black Death.

programme.title: France: The Postwar Recovery
programme.desc: In France, D-Day brought hope. But as the nation began to rebuild, the dream of a brighter future soon clashed with the harsh reality of post-war life.

programme.title: Europe's Secret Armies
programme.desc: After the German invasion of 1940, the Norwegian government fled to London, leaving the country in the hands of the collaborator Quisling. But there were many willing people to fight back.

programme.title: Nazi Collaborators
programme.desc: The IRA never shared fascist ideology, but it hated the British and the apparently peaceful methods of the de Valera government in the Irish Republic.

programme.title: The War Files
programme.desc: From murder on the streets of Warsaw to the liberation of Europe, this lucid and engaging series provides a dramatic account of a conflict that engulfed the free world.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries of WWII
programme.desc: The Japanese raid on Pearl Harbor on December 7, 1941, shocked the world and drew the USA into the war. Did British Intelligence and Britain's Prime Minister Winston Churchill know in advance of the Japanese attack?

programme.title: Time Team
programme.desc: The team unearths the secrets of a Cotswolds field. Roman coins and bits of masonry have been found on this land, but it's the discovery of a piece of mosaic floor that has the archaeologists excited.

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: A country estate ravaged by revolution; a haunted hospital in a Japanese forest; and a tranquil island said to have inspired a musical legend. Each haunted shell ready to tell its own story.

programme.title: The 100 Days
programme.desc: Pivotal historical events unfold over 100 days, revealing origins, consequences, and lesser-known incidents surrounding major occurrences that shaped the modern world.

programme.title: Rise of the Nazis
programme.desc: A look at how Hitler and the Nazi party rose to power in Germany during the 1930s. It is a powerful portrait of the greed, manipulation and frightening underestimation of Hitler's ambition.

programme.title: 48 Hours to Victory
programme.desc: The evacuation of Dunkirk and its impact on the outcome of World War II.

programme.title: Lost Women Spies
programme.desc: In 2000, boxes containing top-secret files were found in a garden shed in Cornwall. They detailed the lives and codenames of Britain's first female agents sent to the frontline during the war.

programme.title: The Kindness Diaries
programme.desc: Leon Logothetis hops on a vintage motorbike for a 25,000-mile trip around the world with no money, food, petrol or place to stay. He puts his fate in the hands of strangers and rewards those who show kindness.

programme.title: When Calls the Heart
programme.desc: The Garrison Gang comes for their gold with Hope Valley residents in the crosshairs. Angela visits the Schwartzman School and Rosemary uncovers the truth about Ava.

programme.title: A Very Tall Man
programme.desc: Gary Hoogvliet, a very tall man, interviews interesting folk, not quite as tall as he, but nevertheless with fascinating and inspiring stories to tell.

programme.title: LIFE Church - Online
programme.desc: Join Senior Pastors Paul and Maree de Jong along with the LIFE Team for their Sunday service experience, pre-recorded from their Central Campus in Auckland, New Zealand.

programme.title: Canada Out Of Doors
programme.desc: Highlights the adventures of Northern Ontario tourism outfitter and seaplane pilot Joel Theriault from Air Ivanhoe. A blend of flying, exploring, construction and renovations, camp life, hunting, and cooking of wild game.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.sub-title: What Has Jesus Done for Us? - Part 1
programme.desc: Are you missing out on the good life Jesus died to give you? Today, Joyce shares how to go beyond salvation and start enjoying every benefit God intended for you, beginning now!

programme.title: Joel Osteen
programme.desc: Direct from Houston, Texas, join Joel and Victoria Osteen and the team from Lakewood Church, for a session of powerful music and empowering preaching.

programme.title: Songs of Praise
programme.desc: Sally Magnusson begins the first of three journeys in the beautiful West Highlands of Scotland and heads for the islands of Cumbrae and Bute.

programme.title: Tyson's Run
programme.desc: An unathletic boy with autism strives to become an unlikely marathon champion learning that with faith in yourself and the courage to take the first step, anything is possible.

programme.title: Veggie Tales
programme.sub-title: Minnesota Cuke and the Search for Samson's Hairbrush
programme.desc: Plenty of fun, adventures and silly songs with Bob the Tomato, Larry the Cucumber and all the Veggie Tales gang. Join them as they share stories from the Bible and learn about God.

programme.title: Kids Beach Club
programme.desc: Join the Beach Club Kids as they navigate life, explore character lessons, and have a blast playing memorable games while discovering God through the pages of His Word, the Bible.

programme.title: Torchlighters: Heroes of the Faith
programme.desc: George Muller lived on radical prayer, depending on God to supply all his needs instead of asking others for help - even in his most desperate situations.

programme.title: Ancestors: Old Testament
programme.desc: Discover how similar we are to our faith ancestors from the Old Testament. These hilarious animations reveal more about Bible heroes, villains, and everyday folks that God selected to do extraordinary things.

programme.title: The Catholic Guy
programme.desc: Bruce Downes is The Catholic Guy. No matter your age, situation or background, be prepared to laugh, learn and listen to what God is trying to say to you. Wherever you matter where you are around the world today, God is never far from you.

programme.title: The Incredible Journey
programme.sub-title: The Bible - What It Can Do For You
programme.desc: Gary Kent has produced documentaries on subjects including the Bible, prophecy, events, places & natural health. His passion is to share the news of Jesus' soon return.

programme.title: Helping Hands
programme.desc: Celebrating the people and organisations across Australia who make the world a better place. This week we take another look at Part 1 of our Op for Change story and our panel discuss care and support for young people.

programme.title: Two for the Win
programme.desc: A world champion ski racer and local ski instructor find romance on the slopes as he returns home and prepares for the biggest race of his life.

programme.title: Living and Launching
programme.desc: Meet the Mullings family. They were ready to move to Miami, but now they're expecting their fourth baby. How will Terrence and Emma make it to the USA now?

programme.title: Smoketown
programme.sub-title: I_m Not Doing This By Myself
programme.desc: In the wake of a mysterious and shocking murder, three unique people - an Assistant Chief of Police, a reporter, and a teenage girl - are empowered to fight for the city's poorest neighbourhood.

programme.title: New Horizons
programme.sub-title: Exodus: Set Free to Follow God Pt8
programme.desc: God rescues people from slavery is a model for every act of salvation. However, God's interest is not merely in rescuing people but to bring them into a life-giving relationship that is part of His plan.

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.sub-title: Believe Right And See Good Pt 1 of 4
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches messages centred on the pure gospel of the grace of God. His desire is to help believers understand grace and how deeply loved they are by their heavenly Father.

programme.title: Bible Discovery TV
programme.desc: Hosted by the Hembree family, a daily devotional show where Rod, Janice, Ryan and Corie walk you through the Word in a way that will forever change how you read, learn and experience the Bible.

programme.title: Elevation Experience
programme.desc: The Elevation Experience with Pastor Steven Furtick features inspirational and challenging messages from Pastor Steven as well as original worship music from Elevation Church in Charlotte, North Carolina.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.sub-title: What Has Jesus Done for Us? - Part 1
programme.desc: Are you missing out on the good life Jesus died to give you? Today, Joyce shares how to go beyond salvation and start enjoying every benefit God intended for you, beginning now!

programme.title: Two for the Win
programme.desc: A world champion ski racer and local ski instructor find romance on the slopes as he returns home and prepares for the biggest race of his life.

programme.title: Celebrations with Lacey Chabert
programme.desc: 17-year old Makyla founded non-profit Baila Conmigo to offer free dance programs to children in need. Lacey and her team are ready to recognise this inspiring leader by throwing her a graduation party.

programme.title: Celebrations with Lacey Chabert
programme.desc: Liv created the Underdog Community Project to aid the overlooked unhoused community and their pets. Lacey Chabert and team come together to celebrate and honour Liv's selfless dedication and big heart in a big way.

programme.title: Celebrations with Lacey Chabert
programme.desc: Partially deaf himself, high school senior Jonah volunteers at 'No Limits' a nonprofit teaching deaf children skills. Now, Lacey and her team are ready to throw this teen role model a true Hollywood red carpet gala.

programme.title: Celebrations with Lacey Chabert
programme.desc: Teacher Adrien Murphy is the founder of after school program Kindness Club, where she inspires kids to give back to the community. Lacey shows Adrien that kindness comes back to you with a surprise Glamp-out to remember.

programme.title: I Lived on Parker Avenue
programme.desc: Adopted at birth and raised in Louisiana, David Scotton is on a journey to meet the parents he's never known. I Lived on Parker Avenue is a short documentary about a young man's search for where his life began.

programme.title: Billy Graham Classics
programme.desc: God's mercy is stronger than our misery. John 5 (Boston 1982)A.

programme.title: GGC Life TV
programme.desc: Vision for a church that is real, life-changing and uplifting, Glorious Gospel Church and their values are based firmly in the bible and their aim is to express the Good News of Jesus Christ in a practical way.

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.sub-title: Believe Right And See Good Pt 1 of 4
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches messages centred on the pure gospel of the grace of God. His desire is to help believers understand grace and how deeply loved they are by their heavenly Father.

programme.title: Connect
programme.desc: A school theatre group aspires to stage every book of the Bible. The kids have a few questions and an ever-expanding cast of surprising and often bizarre visitors is on hand to help them navigate their journey through the scriptures.

programme.title: Jentezen Franklin
programme.desc: New York Times bestselling author, Pastor Jentezen Franklin, brings practical meaning to spiritual truths found in God's Word. Kingdom Connection is the teaching ministry of Free Chapel, a multi-campus church with a global ministry.

programme.title: The Christian View
programme.desc: A fast-paced, high-energy half-hour TV talk show with a panel of sharp, well-educated, quick-witted women and men - and the occasional guest co-host - discussing today's hot topics and headlines from a Biblical perspective.

programme.title: Sylvanian Families
programme.desc: In Sylvanian village, everyone awaits the Festival of the Stars, but rabbit girl Freya worries as she must find the Tree of the Year for the main event.

programme.title: The Boss Baby: Family Business
programme.desc: Boss Baby continues to navigate the cutthroat corporate jungle gym of Baby Corp, while angling to achieve the near-impossible: the work-life balance of a modern career baby.

programme.title: Sing
programme.desc: A dapper koala who has fallen on hard times has one final chance to restore his crumbling theatre by producing the world's greatest singing competition.

programme.title: Spider-Man: Into the Spider-Verse
programme.desc: Brooklyn teen Miles Morales is introduced to the limitless possibilities of the Spider-Verse, where more than one can wear the mask.

programme.title: Fred Claus
programme.desc: Santa's brother Fred, who has lost belief in Christmas, discovers that a scheming efficiency expert is out to shut down Christmas forever.

programme.title: Abominable
programme.desc: When teenage Yi encounters a young yeti on the roof of her apartment building, she and her friends embark on an epic quest to reunite the magical creature with his family.

programme.title: Hop
programme.desc: An egg emergency ensues when the rock 'n' roll-loving teen son of the Easter Bunny shirks his responsibility and runs away from home.

programme.title: The Croods: A New Age
programme.desc: In search of a new home, the Croods encounter the more sophisticated Betterman family. A new threat forces the two families to set aside their differences to avoid extinction.

programme.title: Christmas with the Kranks
programme.desc: Fed up with the commercial aspects of Christmas, the Kranks decide to skip Christmas this year and forgo the gifts, the tree, the decorations and to spend the dollars saved on a Caribbean cruise.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda 4
programme.desc: After three death-defying adventures, Po, the Dragon Warrior is called upon by destiny to become the spiritual leader of the Valley of Peace.

programme.title: Rise of the Guardians
programme.desc: When the evil spirit Pitch launches an assault on Earth, the immortal Guardians must join forces for the first time to protect the hopes, beliefs and imagination of children all over the world.

programme.title: Cloudy with a Chance of Meatballs 2
programme.desc: Flint thought he saved the world when he destroyed his infamous invention but he soon learns that the machine survived and has created 'foodimals'! Now he is on a mission to save the world - again!

programme.title: Monsters Vs Aliens
programme.desc: Follows the adventures of BOB, Link, Dr Cockroach, and Susan as they learn to adapt to a new world and work side-by-side.

programme.title: An American Tail

programme.title: Time Team
programme.desc: The team delve into the recent past to uncover the hidden archaeology behind the biggest battle that never was, the planned defence of Britain against a Nazi invasion in 1940.

programme.title: The 100 Days
programme.desc: Pivotal historical events unfold over 100 days, revealing origins, consequences, and lesser-known incidents surrounding major occurrences that shaped the modern world.

programme.title: Rise of the Nazis
programme.desc: A look at how Hitler and the Nazi party rose to power in Germany during the 1930s. It is a powerful portrait of the greed, manipulation and frightening underestimation of Hitler's ambition.

programme.title: 48 Hours to Victory
programme.desc: The evacuation of Dunkirk and its impact on the outcome of World War II.

programme.title: Lost Women Spies
programme.desc: In 2000, boxes containing top-secret files were found in a garden shed in Cornwall. They detailed the lives and codenames of Britain's first female agents sent to the frontline during the war.

programme.title: Europe's Secret Armies
programme.desc: The Polish people were among the first to feel the full heart-stopping force of the German Wermacht. This is the story of the ways in which they fought back, including the Ghetto Uprising of 1943.

programme.title: Nazi Collaborators
programme.desc: There is now doubt that Mohammad Amin al-Husayni, the Grand Mufti of Jerusalem collaborated with the Nazis. At what point does the desire to support your people become unacceptable?

programme.title: The War Files
programme.desc: From murder on the streets of Warsaw to the liberation of Europe, this lucid and engaging series provides a dramatic account of a conflict that engulfed the free world.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries of WWII
programme.desc: On May 10, 1941, Rudolph Hess, former deputy Fuhrer of the Third Reich, made a lone flight to Britain. Was Hess attempting to make peace with the British before the German invasion of the Soviet Union?

programme.title: Time Team
programme.desc: The team delve into the recent past to uncover the hidden archaeology behind the biggest battle that never was, the planned defence of Britain against a Nazi invasion in 1940.

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: A Texan retreat for the rich and infamous, a remote island complex, scene of an uprising and a stronghold that inspired an Irish hero. Each haunted shell ready to tell its own story.

programme.title: France: The Postwar Recovery
programme.desc: In France, D-Day brought hope. But as the nation began to rebuild, the dream of a brighter future soon clashed with the harsh reality of post-war life.

programme.title: Prince Albert: A Victorian Hero Revealed
programme.desc: Through a wealth of personal archive, the Prince Consort's influence in shaping Britain is revealed.

programme.title: Royal Autopsy
programme.desc: Prof Alice Roberts uncovers the painful final days of Queen Anne. A post mortem reveals the truth behind her tragic losses and death from blood clots caused by autoimmunity.

programme.title: Edwardian Britain in Colour
programme.desc: Edwardian Britain was the richest, most powerful country in the world. We look at what this means for men, women and children hard at work in the mills and the mines of the north, and London's docks and markets.

programme.title: Good Morning TVSN
programme.desc: Kick off your mornings with TVSN as we showcase hot products with offer sneak peeks and our lively competitions. Enjoy vibrant and engaging mornings with TVSN!

programme.title: The Christian View
programme.desc: A fast-paced, high-energy half-hour TV talk show with a panel of sharp, well-educated, quick-witted women and men - and the occasional guest co-host - discussing today's hot topics and headlines from a Biblical perspective.

programme.title: At the Table
programme.desc: At The Table is where we share, laugh and dream. Real women, real conversations, real issues. It's where you'll find information on family, health and spirituality, but most of all, a community doing motherhood together.

programme.title: The Restoration Road
programme.desc: As we travel this side of life, none of us arrive anywhere by accident. We choose, think, pray, and feel our way to our destination. Our inner GPS guides us to one of two places: destruction or restoration. Which direction are you heading?

programme.title: Bible Discovery TV
programme.desc: Hosted by the Hembree family, a daily devotional show where Rod, Janice, Ryan and Corie walk you through the Word in a way that will forever change how you read, learn and experience the Bible.

programme.title: Answers with Bayless Conley
programme.desc: In Intercession for a Wicked City Part 2, Pastor Bayless explores how Abraham's persistent prayers for Sodom reflect our calling to pray for the lost today.

programme.title: Katherine Ruonala Ministries
programme.desc: If Jesus Himself withdrew to the mountain to pray, how much more must we set aside time to pray like Him.

programme.title: The 700 Club
programme.desc: With news, interviews, lifestyle features and true-life stories from a Christian perspective, The 700 Club shares powerful and dramatic testimonies of God touching people's lives.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.sub-title: What Has Jesus Done for Us? - Part 2
programme.desc: Do you know what a "cheese and cracker" Christian is? You're about to find out. Today, Joyce teaches how to stop settling and start receiving everything that's already yours in Christ.

programme.title: In Touch
programme.sub-title: How To Stay Young And Useful All Your Life/A Life Of Obedience
programme.desc: Tackling important life issues such as parenting, finances, personal crises, emotions and relationships, Dr Stanley fervently believes the Bible to be the inerrant Word of God.

programme.title: Two for the Win
programme.desc: A world champion ski racer and local ski instructor find romance on the slopes as he returns home and prepares for the biggest race of his life.

programme.title: In God's Company: William Hartley
programme.desc: Today William Hartley would be applauded for establishing a brand that made him immensely wealthy. A man of great compassion, he used his immense wealth to enrich the lives of others. This documentary tells his inspiring story.

programme.title: Centuries Collide
programme.desc: The famous Warrior-King, Charles the Great, better known as Charlemagne. Throughout the European dark ages he conquered and built the largest Empire in Europe after fall of the Western-Roman Empire.

programme.title: Bible Man
programme.sub-title: A Wake-Up Call for the Slacker
programme.desc: Miles Peterson had everything: Money, power, fame. Until he lost it. Then Miles finds the power of God and harnesses that power to become Bibleman.

programme.title: Sea Kids
programme.desc: This program will help transform the heart and mind of every child as they learn how to tangibly live out biblical principles and build a strong foundation in Jesus.

programme.title: Holy Moly
programme.desc: This program turns the Bible into a living, breathing colouring book that will delight children of all ages. The series focuses on the Biblical characters' actions and emotions.

programme.title: The Blello Show
programme.desc: Join Kyle, Lyds, Extra Bear, and Stu as they share with you some cool vids, catchy catch phrases crazy challenges, things you can do in 3 minutes, and other random stuff to make your life awesome. It's the Blello Show! Let's go!

programme.title: Elevation Experience
programme.desc: The Elevation Experience with Pastor Steven Furtick features inspirational and challenging messages from Pastor Steven as well as original worship music from Elevation Church in Charlotte, North Carolina.

programme.title: A Moment in History
programme.desc: Join host Seth Udinski as he explores the most pivotal moments in history and the Bible, providing insight into the events that have shaped our world.

programme.title: Jeni: Seeking the Extraordinary
programme.desc: Travel with Jeni & Sarah from Michigan to Florida. Sample some great food, visit well known sites and have lots of fun. Most importantly, meet and talk with a host of extraordinary women about identity and purpose

programme.title: Drive Thru History: The Gospels
programme.desc: Dave Stotts takes us on his most exciting adventure yet as he tells the story of Jesus from the locations recorded in the Gospels of Matthew, Mark, Luke, and John.

programme.title: Secrets of Sacred Architecture
programme.desc: Throughout history, sacred buildings represented the greatest feats of innovative engineering & artistic design. Unlock the elements that make these structures so fascinating and unveil the meaning in religious architecture across the USA.

programme.title: The Other Side of the River
programme.desc: As a young girl living in the Amazonian jungle, Elba wondered if there wasn't a better life on the other side of the river.

programme.title: Lost Legacy Reclaimed
programme.desc: The story of twelve Christian men and women from Carthage (modern Tunisia) who refused to deny their faith and were brutally executed by order of the Roman Emperor Marcus Aurelius.

programme.title: The Incredible Journey
programme.sub-title: The Girl Who Talked to the Stars
programme.desc: Gary Kent has produced documentaries on subjects including the Bible, prophecy, events, places & natural health. His passion is to share the news of Jesus' soon return.

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.sub-title: Believe Right And See Good Pt 2 of 4
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches messages centred on the pure gospel of the grace of God. His desire is to help believers understand grace and how deeply loved they are by their heavenly Father.

programme.title: Joel Osteen
programme.desc: Direct from Houston, Texas, join Joel and Victoria Osteen and the team from Lakewood Church, for a session of powerful music and empowering preaching.

programme.title: The Way of the Master
programme.desc: Is baptism required for salvation? What about death bed confessions?

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.sub-title: What Has Jesus Done for Us? - Part 2
programme.desc: Do you know what a "cheese and cracker" Christian is? You're about to find out. Today, Joyce teaches how to stop settling and start receiving everything that's already yours in Christ.

programme.title: Celebrations with Lacey Chabert
programme.desc: Carmela prepares to lead her first solo mission with Mending Kids, providing medical care to sick children worldwide. Lacey sends her off with a surprise fiesta that brings her back to her Peruvian roots.

programme.title: Celebrations with Lacey Chabert
programme.desc: Sheri founded Happy Hats to bring joy back to sick children while they receive treatment. Lacey plans an elegant Tea Party to show how Happy Hats make a difference.

programme.title: Celebrations with Lacey Chabert
programme.desc: Dr Ifunanya Nweke founded Jazz Hands for Autism to empower neurodivergent creatives. Lacey plans to throw Ifu an incredible Christmas party to thank her for supporting the community.

programme.title: Power for Living
programme.desc: Powerful words from Evangelist and Pastor Bill Newman.

programme.title: In Touch
programme.sub-title: How To Stay Young And Useful All Your Life/A Life Of Obedience
programme.desc: Tackling important life issues such as parenting, finances, personal crises, emotions and relationships, Dr Stanley fervently believes the Bible to be the inerrant Word of God.

programme.title: David Pawson
programme.sub-title: Building a New Testament Church Pt2b
programme.desc: Why was the Bible written? UK Theologian, Cambridge Scholar, Pastor and Bible Teacher David Pawson explores scripture and discovers some hidden gems.

programme.title: Summer in the Vineyard
programme.desc: Frankie and Nate are gearing up for the town's largest event. When an issue with the new wine puts things in jeopardy, the relationship and the partnership will be put to test.

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.sub-title: Believe Right And See Good Pt 2 of 4
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches messages centred on the pure gospel of the grace of God. His desire is to help believers understand grace and how deeply loved they are by their heavenly Father.

programme.title: Go Frills
programme.desc: For lots of original songs and loads of fun, join the Frills family aboard their funky fun tour bus as they have exciting adventures, meet new people and present their awesome live rock show.

programme.title: Night Owls & Early Birds
programme.desc: Night Owls and Early Birds is a new topical Bible study show from the creators of Owlegories. Join Hoot, Savannah, Screech, Charlie, and Steve as they take a deeper dive into the truths found in God's Word.

programme.title: The Garden
programme.desc: Lenny Lion and Lucy Lamb are the caretakers for a magical garden where anything can grow. They work for The Boss (God) who gives them a new assignment to complete in every episode.

programme.title: Impact for Life
programme.desc: Pastors Peter and Bev Mortlock share principles for living, hear life stories from everyday New Zealanders and equip people to mature and grow into Christ-likeness while maximising their potential.

programme.title: Be Great. Do Good
programme.desc: There is a myth when it comes to business leadership of the "self-made" leader that lacks credibility. The reality is that all leaders are shaped and influenced by others.

programme.title: Spirit: Stallion of the Cimarron
programme.desc: Spirit is a wild and rambunctious stallion who travels across the frontiers of the Old West; where he befriends a young human and finds true love with a mare.

programme.title: Antz
programme.desc: A worker ant changes roles with a soldier ant to woo a forbidden princess.

programme.title: Wallace & Gromit: Curse Of Were-Rabbit
programme.desc: Wallace and his loyal dog, Gromit, set out to discover the mystery behind the garden sabotage that plagues their village and threatens the annual giant vegetable growing contest.

programme.title: Jumanji: The Next Level
programme.desc: As they return to Jumanji to rescue one of their own, nothing is as they expect. They will have to brave parts unknown and unexplored to escape the world's most dangerous game.

programme.title: How to Train Your Dragon
programme.desc: Set in the mythical world of burly Vikings and fire-breathing dragons, a Viking teenager takes in an injured dragon and sees an opportunity to set his tribe on a new course.

programme.title: How to Train Your Dragon 2
programme.desc: After discovering an ice cave that is home to hundreds of new types of dragons, Hiccup and Toothless find themselves at the centre of a battle to prevent a costly war across their land.

programme.title: The Secret Life of Pets
programme.desc: A quick-witted terrier finds his position in the household threatened when his master brings home a stray mongrel with no polish.

programme.title: The Secret Life of Pets 2
programme.desc: Terrier Max is back and is coping with some major life changes. This chapter explores the emotional lives of our pets: the deep bond between them and the families that love them.

programme.title: Beethoven
programme.desc: A vet targets a disaster-prone St Bernard for animal experimentation, and it's up to his family to save the cuddly canine.

programme.title: The Grinch
programme.desc: A cynical grump goes on a mission to steal Christmas, only to have his heart changed by a young girl's generous holiday spirit.

programme.title: Shaun the Sheep Movie
programme.desc: It's up to the most rascally sheep in England to bring the flock home when a caravan and a very steep hill lead them all to the big city.

programme.title: Storks
programme.desc: Storks have moved on from delivering babies to packages. But when an order for a baby appears, the best delivery stork must scramble to fix the error by delivering the baby.

programme.title: Dinosaur Train: Adventure Island
programme.desc: Dinosaur siblings Buddy, Tiny, Shiny and Don try to reunite with their parents after an earthquake causes theme park robots to go rogue.

programme.title: Paddington
programme.desc: When a Peruvian bear travels to London in search of a home, he finds himself lost and alone at Paddington Station. This charming family comedy is based on the classic children's books.

programme.title: Sing
programme.desc: A dapper koala who has fallen on hard times has one final chance to restore his crumbling theatre by producing the world's greatest singing competition.

programme.title: The Karate Kid (2010)
programme.desc: Dre, a young boy, finds himself bullied by Cheng, a rebellious kung fu prodigy at his school. However, things change after he befriends Mr Han, a maintenance man, who happens to be a kung fu expert.

programme.desc: Embrace timeless elegance with ELLE French Fashion. Chic designs inspired by Parisian style bring sophistication and confidence as well as effortless glamour to your everyday wardrobe.

programme.title: Gourmet Foods
programme.desc: Cook healthier, faster, smarter, easier! Kitchen wishes are granted with our impressive range of modern cooking appliances that make your life easier. Being a domestic goddess was never so easy!

programme.title: Watches TBC
programme.desc: Discover timeless style with this hour of Watches. From classic elegance to modern design. Each piece offers precision craftsmanship and reliable performance to suit every moment of your day.

programme.title: Good Morning TVSN
programme.desc: Kick off your mornings with TVSN as we showcase hot products with offer sneak peeks and our lively competitions. Enjoy vibrant and engaging mornings with TVSN!

programme.title: Be Great. Do Good
programme.desc: There is a myth when it comes to business leadership of the "self-made" leader that lacks credibility. The reality is that all leaders are shaped and influenced by others.

programme.title: Towards Belief
programme.desc: Australian pastor and host, Karl Faase travels to the UK, USA and Australia to interview more than thirty leading authors, speakers and apologists as they seek to defuse the top belief blockers to the Christian faith.

programme.title: Holy Rollin'
programme.desc: Get a feel for the rugged sunburnt countryside and the people of the outback as Nick and Yvette Wynne, the motorcycle missionaries, traverse 20 000 km in 3 months riding around Australia.

programme.title: Soul Sessions
programme.desc: An exploration into the New Zealand gospel music scene with a focus on Pacific musicians and artists. The award-winning artists are a mix of new and established faces, who share the vision of expressing their faith through music.

programme.title: Jentezen Franklin
programme.desc: New York Times bestselling author, Pastor Jentezen Franklin, brings practical meaning to spiritual truths found in God's Word. Kingdom Connection is the teaching ministry of Free Chapel, a multi-campus church with a global ministry.

programme.title: David Jeremiah
programme.desc: As Christians, we can look forward to heaven because we can trust God's promise and plan for us to spend eternity with Him.

programme.title: PowerPoint with Jack Graham
programme.desc: PowerPoint Ministries started as a vision of Dr Jack Graham 20 years ago with a vision to glorify God by introducing Jesus Christ as Lord to as many people as possible and to develop them in Christian living.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: God's Word is the cure for overcoming negative thoughts about yourself. Learn why you can speak God's Word with authority!

programme.title: Hour of Power
programme.desc: Pastor Bobby Schuller provides spiritual principles and practices that can help people become happy students of Jesus and live a life of meaning believing there is no fuller, richer life than the one that is lived in Christ.

programme.title: Drive Thru History
programme.desc: Dave Stotts explores the amazing lives of the very first Christians. Using the Book of Acts as a roadmap, Dave travels the Mediterranean region to share the people, places, and events that launched the Christian faith.

programme.title: Faith Runs Deep
programme.desc: In this new program from the producers of the award-winning series, Jesus the Game Changer, host Karl Faase travels around Australia in an iconic Holden ute, discovering a rich and inspiring history of faith.

programme.title: Everyone: Amsterdam 23
programme.desc: This 3 day conference held in the Netherlands in 2023 was packed with many great speakers around the world. All with one heart and mission to reach EVERYONE worldwide with Christ.

programme.title: What's Cooking with Young & Free
programme.desc: Join Young & Free in the kitchen as they serve up a feast of music videos and a side of laughs.

programme.title: OK TV
programme.desc: Brendon and Cathie have poured their 30 years of experience with kids in schools and in ministry and the great goals of the local church into a energetic show that will engage the next generation.

programme.title: Connect
programme.desc: A school theatre group aspires to stage every book of the Bible. The kids have a few questions and an ever-expanding cast of surprising and often bizarre visitors is on hand to help them navigate their journey through the scriptures.

programme.title: TV One Life
programme.desc: Between the humour, music and unfiltered ministry, the message is clear, "God can change your life"! Fasten your seatbelts for this roller coaster ride of a show!

programme.title: Katherine Ruonala Ministries
programme.desc: If Jesus Himself withdrew to the mountain to pray, how much more must we set aside time to pray like Him.

programme.title: A Very Tall Man
programme.desc: Gary Hoogvliet, a very tall man, interviews interesting folk, not quite as tall as he, but nevertheless with fascinating and inspiring stories to tell.

programme.title: Be That
programme.desc: How we choose to see adversity determines how we navigate it. This episode highlights the importance of facing adversity with optimism and hope for the future. With guest Monika Siemonek.

programme.title: When Calls the Heart
programme.desc: The Garrison Gang comes for their gold with Hope Valley residents in the crosshairs. Angela visits the Schwartzman School and Rosemary uncovers the truth about Ava.

programme.title: Behind the Sash
programme.desc: Its the Mrs Australia Official Final an event that you won't expect.

programme.title: Compassion Stories
programme.desc: Follow powerful stories highlighting the transformative work of the Compassion Child Sponsorship Program in Africa, South America, India and Asia.

programme.title: Vindication
programme.desc: The late night activities of a former addict cause the man's wife to suspect a relapse. Becky Travis asks Detective Travis to investigate as a personal favor.

programme.title: Billy Graham Classics
programme.desc: God's mercy is stronger than our misery. John 5 (Boston 1982)A.

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.sub-title: Believe Right And See Good Pt 3 of 4
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches messages centred on the pure gospel of the grace of God. His desire is to help believers understand grace and how deeply loved they are by their heavenly Father.

programme.title: In Touch
programme.sub-title: How To Stay Young And Useful All Your Life/A Life Of Obedience
programme.desc: Tackling important life issues such as parenting, finances, personal crises, emotions and relationships, Dr Stanley fervently believes the Bible to be the inerrant Word of God.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: God's Word is the cure for overcoming negative thoughts about yourself. Learn why you can speak God's Word with authority!

programme.desc: The Garrison Gang comes for their gold with Hope Valley residents in the crosshairs. Angela visits the Schwartzman School and Rosemary uncovers the truth about Ava.

programme.title: Behind the Sash
programme.desc: Its the Mrs Australia Official Final an event that you won't expect.

programme.title: Harriet Tubman: They Called Her Moses
programme.desc: Discover the real Harriet Tubman in this compelling documentary. Narrated by Alfrelynn Roberts it features expert interviews and remarkable early 20th century audio recordings of African-American spirituals sung by former slaves.

programme.title: Bible Land Passages
programme.sub-title: Shiloh - The Place where God Once Dwelt
programme.desc: Read about places like Beersheba, Jericho, Jerusalem, Caesarea, and cities surrounding the Sea of Galilee, and discover that those places exist just as the Bible describes.

programme.title: Hour of Power
programme.desc: Pastor Bobby Schuller provides spiritual principles and practices that can help people become happy students of Jesus and live a life of meaning believing there is no fuller, richer life than the one that is lived in Christ.

programme.title: Impact for Life
programme.desc: Pastors Peter and Bev Mortlock share principles for living, hear life stories from everyday New Zealanders and equip people to mature and grow into Christ-likeness while maximising their potential.

programme.title: Answers with Bayless Conley
programme.desc: In Intercession for a Wicked City Part 2, Pastor Bayless explores how Abraham's persistent prayers for Sodom reflect our calling to pray for the lost today.

programme.title: PowerPoint with Jack Graham
programme.desc: PowerPoint Ministries started as a vision of Dr Jack Graham 20 years ago with a vision to glorify God by introducing Jesus Christ as Lord to as many people as possible and to develop them in Christian living.

programme.title: The Catholic Guy
programme.desc: Bruce Downes is The Catholic Guy. No matter your age, situation or background, be prepared to laugh, learn and listen to what God is trying to say to you. Wherever you matter where you are around the world today, God is never far from you.

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.sub-title: Believe Right And See Good Pt 3 of 4
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches dynamic messages centred on the pure gospel of the grace of God. His desire is to help believers understand grace and how greatly blessed, highly favoured and deeply loved they are by their heavenly Father.

programme.title: Veggie Tales
programme.desc: Plenty of fun, laughs, adventures and of course, silly songs with Bob the Tomato, Larry the Cucumber and all the Veggie Tales gang. Join them as they share stories from the Bible and learn about God who loves them.

programme.title: Deditos
programme.desc: This quirky kids show introduces children to classic stories from the Old Testament using finger puppets.

programme.title: New Horizons
programme.sub-title: Exodus: Set Free to Follow God Pt8
programme.desc: God's rescue of His people from slavery is a model for every act of salvation. However, God's interest is not merely in rescuing people, but to bring them into a life-giving relationship that is part of His plan to renew the whole world.

programme.title: Canada Out Of Doors
programme.desc: Highlights the adventures of Northern Ontario tourism outfitter and seaplane pilot Joel Theriault from Air Ivanhoe and is a blend of flying, exploring, construction and renovations, camp life, fishing, hunting, and cooking of wild game.

programme.title: The Karate Kid (2010)
programme.desc: Dre, a young boy, finds himself bullied by Cheng, a rebellious kung fu prodigy at his school. However, things change after he befriends Mr Han, a maintenance man, who happens to be a kung fu expert.

programme.title: The Lost World: Jurassic Park
programme.desc: It has been four years since the disaster at Jurassic Park and two groups are in a race against time that will determine the fate of the remote island's prehistoric inhabitants.

programme.title: Shrek
programme.desc: An ogre, with the help of an annoying donkey, tries to win back his swamp by returning a princess to a scheming lord.

programme.title: Shrek 2
programme.desc: Happily ever after will have to wait as Shrek, Princess Fiona, and Donkey visit the in-laws. Outraged that Fiona has wed an ogre, the King hires hit man Puss in Boots to make the problem disappear.

programme.title: Hook
programme.desc: A lawyer who has lost any memory that he was once the legendary Peter Pan must travel to Neverland, aided by Tinker Bell, to rescue his children from his nemesis, Captain Hook.

programme.title: Journey 2: The Mysterious Island
programme.desc: The journey begins when young adventurer Sean receives a coded distress signal from a mysterious island where no island should exist.

programme.title: Minions
programme.desc: Three unemployed henchmen find themselves working for the world's first-ever female supervillain and her inventor husband, who plan to take over the world.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda
programme.desc: Clumsy and overweight panda, Po, dreams of becoming a kung fu master.

programme.title: The Smurfs 2
programme.desc: When evil Gargamel kidnaps Smurfette, the Smurfs and their human friends led by Patrick unite to help her escape the clutches of the Naughties.

programme.title: How the Grinch Stole Christmas
programme.desc: He's mean and green and he hates the yo-ho-hoing. The Grinch conspires to steal Christmas from Whoville, making off with the presents, decorations, trees and every other joyful thing.

programme.title: Mr. Peabody & Sherman
programme.desc: When Mr Peabody and Sherman break the rules of time travel by meeting many of history's greatest characters, they must repair the damage they have done before it changes their world forever.

programme.title: The Flintstones
programme.desc: After an aptitude test mix-up, Fred Flintstone trades his job as Bronto-crane operator for a vice presidency. An evil executive then plots to use Fred as the fall guy in an embezzlement scheme.

programme.title: Top Cat Begins
programme.desc: Poor, lonely and living on the streets, Top Cat meets Benny, a naive and good-hearted cat looking for adventure.

programme.title: The Secret Life of Pets
programme.desc: A quick-witted terrier finds his position in the household threatened when his master brings home a stray mongrel with no polish.

programme.title: Flushed Away
programme.desc: An upper crust rodent lost in London's sewers gets a savvy female rat to save him from Le Frog, a French mercenary.

programme.desc: High-energy Aussie hits that fire up your night with local flavour.

programme.title: Aussie Music Explosion
programme.desc: From classic rock anthems to chart-topping pop, this is a non-stop journey through the best of Australian music.

programme.title: True Blue
programme.desc: From the songs you grew up with to the artists breaking through right now, this is Aussie music at its best. Big names, fresh finds, and everything in between, all proudly homegrown.

programme.title: Aussie Breakfast
programme.desc: Serving up fresh Aussie tracks to start your day.

programme.title: A Little Chaos
programme.desc: This period drama tells the tale of two landscape artists who become romantically involved while constructing the grand gardens at King Louis XIV's palace at Versailles.

programme.title: Macbeth
programme.desc: After murdering the King of Scotland and taking the throne, Macbeth begins to unravel as he becomes consumed with paranoia and guilt.

programme.title: Brooklyn
programme.desc: An Irish immigrant lands in 1950s Brooklyn, where she falls in love with a local. But when her past catches up with her, she must choose between two countries.

programme.title: Fish Tank
programme.desc: A troubled, volatile 15-year-old girl's mum brings a mysterious stranger into their home. It promises to change everything, but life isn't always that simple.

programme.title: Madame Bovary
programme.desc: Trapped in a loveless marriage and eager for excitement, a doctor's wife seeks love and fulfilment outside the bonds of matrimony.

programme.title: I Am Slave
programme.desc: A thriller set in London's slave trade and centred on a woman's fight for freedom.

programme.title: Beast
programme.desc: Moll is stifled by her surroundings, but too beholden to her family to break away. When she meets Pascal, a free-spirited stranger, a whole new world opens up to her.

programme.title: Churchill
programme.desc: A ticking-clock thriller following Winston Churchill in the 96 hours before D-day.

programme.title: Felicia's Journey
programme.desc: A lovesick young woman searches for the father of her unborn child in seedy Birmingham and becomes involved with a mysterious catering manager.

programme.title: Cheri
programme.desc: In this superb drama set in pre-World War I Paris, an ageing courtesan has an ill-fated love affair with the son of her rival.

programme.title: Love and Friendship
programme.desc: A beautiful young widow visits her in-laws' estate while waiting for social chatter about her personal indiscretions to pass.

programme.title: The Queen of Ireland
programme.desc: Documentary following the life of Irish drag queen Panti Bliss, in the lead up to the historic referendum on marriage equality for same-sex couples in Ireland.

programme.title: McKellen: Playing the Part
programme.desc: Built upon a 14-hour interview, this film is a unique journey through the key landmarks of McKellen's life.

programme.title: The Railway Man
programme.desc: The captivating, true story of a man who discovers the Japanese officer who tortured him during the war is still alive, and sets out to confront him.

programme.title: Skippy
programme.desc: Sonny and his kangaroo Skippy live in Waratah National Park in New South Wales. Matt Hammond, Sonny's father is the park ranger. Skippy saves the day in many adventures.

programme.title: The Coolangatta Gold
programme.desc: Joe Lucas is determined that his son Adam will become a champion iron man. He neglects his younger son, Steve, who is an aspiring band manager and enjoys karate, as well as being his brother's training partner.

programme.title: Emerald City
programme.desc: Two Australian writers (John Hargreaves, Chris Haywood) clash over the Americanization of their country's film industry.

programme.title: The Man from Coxs River
programme.desc: Can a quest to save a mob of brumbies in inaccessible wilderness bring a fiercely independent horseman and a ranger enemy to see the world through each other's eyes?

programme.title: Tom White
programme.desc: Nominated for thirteen Australian Film Institute awards, this drama follows Tom White, an uptight executive who drifts into street-life after a stress-induced nervous breakdown.

programme.title: The Right Hand Man
programme.desc: A stagecoach driver goes to work for a dying, one-armed aristocrat in 1860s Australia.

programme.title: Hammers Over the Anvil
programme.desc: A boy with polio observes the lives of friends and neighbours in an Australian farm community.

programme.title: Spotswood
programme.desc: An expert on productivity shows wacky workers in 1966 Australia how to run their moccasin factory like clockwork, despite laying off more than half the workforce.

programme.title: Brilliant Lies
programme.desc: After being fired, Susy accuses her boss of groping her, but a mediator uncovers conflicting stories. As secrets surface, the truth becomes harder to pin down.

programme.title: Razorback
programme.desc: There's a marauding, indestructible creature that can rip a man in half and destroy a homestead in seconds ... and it is hell bent on terrorising the small isolated community of Gamulla.

programme.title: Attack Force Z
programme.desc: Australian commandos rescue survivors of a downed aircraft on a Japanese-held island.

programme.title: Far East
programme.desc: A journalist's wife needs her ex-lover's help after her husband is arrested in Southeast Asia.

programme.title: Occupation: Rainfall
programme.desc: Two years after aliens land on Earth, survivors from Sydney, Australia, fight in a desperate war as the number of casualties continue to grow.
